^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2018
714 GG0130F1_UPR_DRSNG_STRT_CD GG0130F1_UPR_DRSNG_STRT_CD GG0130F1 Upper Dressing Start Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to dress and undress above the waist; including fasteners, if applicable at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
